title: PlayStation 5 Console
desc: The console GTA 6 was built for. Haptic feedback, adaptive triggers, and Tempest 3D Audio — this is the definitive GTA 6 machine.

title: PlayStation 5 Pro
desc: Maximum PlayStation performance. If you want the strongest PS5 experience for GTA 6 and budget isn't the issue, this is it.

title: Xbox Series X
desc: The premium Xbox option for GTA 6. Full 4K, 120fps capable, and backward compatible with your entire library.

title: Nintendo Switch 2
desc: 2x performance over the original, larger screen, and the best portable gaming library on the planet.

title: DualSense Wireless Controller
desc: GTA 6 is built around it. Haptic feedback, adaptive triggers, and an integrated speaker — feel every crash, shot, and engine rev.

title: Xbox Elite Series 2 Controller
desc: Hair-trigger locks, adjustable thumbstick tension, rubberized grip. The pro controller for serious sessions.

title: 8BitDo Ultimate 2C Wireless Controller
desc: Hall Effect joysticks, 1000Hz polling rate, remappable bumpers. Pro features at a fraction of the price.

title: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless
desc: Multi-device wireless, hybrid ANC, hot-swappable battery. The headset that never makes you choose between platforms.

title: Sony InZone H9 2 Wireless
desc: Built for PS5. Massive upgrade over the original — pairs directly with your console for GTA 6 immersive audio.

title: SteelSeries Arctis GameBuds
desc: Gaming-grade wireless earbuds with low latency. Quality audio without the bulk of a full headset.

title: 49-Inch OLED Ultrawide Gaming Monitor
desc: GTA 6's Vice City deserves an ultrawide. Wrap-around field of view, OLED blacks, and buttery refresh rates.

title: Gigabyte Aorus FO32U2 Pro Monitor
desc: High-performance 4K gaming monitor with vibrant OLED visuals and a refresh rate built for next-gen.

title: Rapid Trigger Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
desc: Adjustable actuation, rapid trigger technology. The competitive edge for shooters where every millisecond counts.

title: Razer DeathAdder V3 Wireless Mouse
desc: 99.8% tracking accuracy, ergonomic shape, ultra-lightweight wireless. The mouse serious PC gamers reach for.

title: Secretlab Titan Evo Gaming Chair
desc: Built for marathon sessions. Cold-cure foam, adjustable lumbar, multiple size options. Sit better, play longer.

title: EUREKA Aero-63 Gaming Desk
desc: Spacious, durable, and built for a real setup. Cable management built in — no more chaos behind the monitor.

title: WD_Black SN850X NVMe SSD
desc: GTA 6 is going to be massive. Expand your PS5 storage or upgrade your PC before the November launch.

title: Elgato HD60 X Capture Card
desc: Stream GTA 6 day one in 4K. Plug between your console and PC — zero lag passthrough, instant broadcast quality.

title: HyperX QuadCast USB Microphone
desc: The streamer's mic. Tap-to-mute, built-in pop filter, four polar patterns. Sounds professional out of the box.

title: KontrolFreek Performance Thumbsticks PS5
desc: Extend your reach, tighten your aim. The cheapest upgrade with the most immediate feel difference on DualSense.
